narration: You trust your financial advisor with your savings — but most have zero legal obligation to put your interests first. Wild, right?
visual: Person silhouette on left, suited advisor on right. Dollar bill animates flying from person toward advisor's pocket. 'ZERO LEGAL DUTY' appears in red below.

narration: Two standards exist. A fiduciary must legally put you first. A suitability advisor just needs the product to not be 'obviously wrong for you.' Big difference.
visual: Light background. Two columns: green FIDUCIARY side with checkmark (labeled 15% of advisors) vs red SUITABILITY side with X mark (labeled 85% of advisors).

narration: Here's where it gets expensive. Advisors can legally pocket seven percent upfront on annuities — that's seven grand on a hundred-thousand-dollar sale, before you earn a cent.
visual: Dark background. Animated annuity contract document with 7% commission highlighted. Dollar counter animates from $0 to $7,000 flowing into advisor's pocket.

narration: The Department of Labor studied this and found conflicted advice costs Americans seventeen billion dollars every year. That's not a loophole — that's the whole business model.
visual: Light background. $17 BILLION in massive red text springs in, surrounded by stacked coin piles. 'U.S. Dept. of Labor' source badge fades in below.

narration: The fix is one word: fiduciary. Seek a fee-only CFP or RIA — zero commissions, legally required to put you first. Only fifteen percent of advisors qualify.
visual: Dark background. Magnifying glass with CFP and RIA inside lens. Three checklist items animate in: Fee-Only, CFP or RIA Title, Ask Are You a Fiduciary. Red badge: ONLY 15% QUALIFY.

narration: Just one percent in hidden fees destroys $187,000 in growth on a hundred-thousand-dollar investment over thirty years. Ask your advisor right now — are you a fiduciary?
visual: Light background. Two animated bars: green ($761K with fiduciary) vs red ($574K with 1% fee drag). $187,000 DIFFERENCE callout. Bold CTA: ARE YOU A FIDUCIARY?
